sections.title: 1. T geometry: vertices, midpoints, face centroids, G

tests.name: Edge squared length |v_i v_j|^2 = 8 for all i != j
Centroid G = (0, 0, 0)
face_1 centroid = (-1/3,  1/3,  1/3)
face_2 centroid = ( 1/3, -1/3,  1/3)
face_3 centroid = ( 1/3,  1/3, -1/3)

sections.title: 2. 24 chambers as A_3 flags (v, e, f) with v in e subset f

tests.name: Number of chambers = 24
All chamber flags distinct
All chamber volumes = V_T / 24 = 1/9
Sum of chamber volumes = V_T = 8/3

sections.title: 3. Sign patterns w.r.t. the 6 medial (mirror) planes

tests.name: All 6 medial planes pass through G (offset = 0)
All 24 chambers have distinct sign patterns
No chamber centroid lies on a mirror (no 0 sign)
Every chamber has at least 1 neighbour
No chamber has more than 4 neighbours
Adjacency graph has at least 24 edges (lower bound from connectivity)
Chamber adjacency graph is connected

sections.title: 5. Validation on the 8 known dissections n in {1,2,3,4,6,8,12,24}

tests.name: n =  1: 1 pieces of 24 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 8/3
n =  1: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n =  2: 2 pieces of 12 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 4/3
n =  2: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n =  3: 3 pieces of 8 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 8/9
n =  3: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n =  4: 4 pieces of 6 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 2/3
n =  4: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n =  6: 6 pieces of 4 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 4/9
n =  6: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n =  8: 8 pieces of 3 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 1/3
n =  8: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n = 12: 12 pieces of 2 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 2/9
n = 12: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
n = 24: 24 pieces of 1 chambers each, all vol = V_T/n = 1/9
n = 24: chamber partition is exact (covers 0..23 once)
24 mod 5 = 4 (not 0), so no chamber-union dissection at n = 5
Binary refinement obstruction: 24 * 2^d mod 5 != 0 for d = 0..7
Ternary refinement obstruction: 24 * 3^d mod 5 != 0 for d = 0..7
Quintisection (24 * 5 = 120 cells, 120 / 5 = 24 cells/piece) is admissible
